response.overview: Nobody is perfect in this world. Everyone has their fair share of their imperfections,so rather than focusing on one's imperfections, one should focus on the positive aspect of an individual.This is thought behind the telefilm "Bin bul e Mehman".Thou this message has been protrayed in a comedic manner but should be implemented in our everyday life.
response.title: Bin Bulaye Mehmaan
